name: sandbox-file-intake
description: Phase 0 safety loop. Proves the system works before anything else runs. NOTHING ORIGINAL IS DESTROYED.

stages.name: intake
stages.description: Normalize copied file to canonical markdown

stages.name: fis-classify
stages.description: FIS classifies: type, domain, subject, slug, confidence

stages.name: manifest-entry
stages.description: Orchestrator built-in: record the packet in MANIFEST.json before scoring

stages.name: bil-score
stages.description: BIL scores relevance: does David care about this?

llm_gate.prompt: Given this classification and relevance score, where should this file go? Respond with: vault, archive, review, or reject.

stages.name: await-approval
stages.description: Orchestrator built-in: HOLD until a human writes CONFIG/approval.json {"approved": true}. Nothing moves without it.

stages.name: log-correction
stages.description: Orchestrator built-in: if the human changed the proposal (REVIEW/corrections.json), log it as BIL training data

stages.name: archive-input
stages.description: Orchestrator built-in: COPY processed INPUT files to ARCHIVE. Copies only — INPUT and originals untouched.
